rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/25/19 - 1. The courtesy copy of the Petition did not have any attachments. Please submit an endorsed-filed copy of the complete Petition. 2. Filing fees were waived at the beginning of this matter. A notice of change of circumstances was never submitted. Examiner is working to determine the total amount of waived fees that must be paid. Once determined, the Petition must be amended to request payment of such fees from the blocked account. 3. The Court-appointed attorney has filed an ex parte petition for fees. Once approved, that must also be included in the amended Petition. Endorsed-filed copies of all additional filings must be received in Room 202 no later than 3/18/19 to avoid further continuance.
